title: Capstone Assistant
summary: Route, retrieve, gate spicy verbs, trace everything, and stop before your pretend tokens bankrupt the pretend budget.
hints: Sensitive verbs include delete/wipe/exfil/password/dump — broad enough to be annoying, small enough to test.
RAG spends budget on retrieve then synthesize; exhaust early to prove you handle `budget_exhausted`.
HITL approval spends a single `hitl_exec` chunk before returning the canned execution line.
acceptance: `run_turn` returns `need_human` until `human_approved` is provided for sensitive routes
Budget monotonically decreases on successful spends and blocks overspend
